A 1-DAY BENCH TRIAL IS HELD ON BIFURCATED ISSUES. EXHIBITS ARE IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, WITNESSES ARE SWORN AND EXAMINED. THE COURT SHALL ISSUE A PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION AND A SUBSEQUENT DATE SHALL BE SET AT THAT TIME. JUDGE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK DANIAL LEMIRE, REPORTER SHEILA PHAM CSR #13293.
